attachDocuments.hint: Added documents will be attached to this effect's consequence instead of added independently.
attachDocuments.label: Attach Documents

data.hint: This data will be applied to each child document added to this.
data.label: Custom Child Data

enabled.hint: Add these documents to every other document created by this automation.
enabled.label: Enable Children

identifiers.hint: Identifiers for external documents to create as grandchildren on each created child or other document. They will all be added with no selection or prompt.
identifiers.label: Child Identifiers

uuids.hint: UUIDs for external documents to create as grandchildren on each created child or other document. They will all be added with no selection or prompt.
uuids.label: Child UUIDs

data.hint: Custom data that overrides the documents' normal data. In the name, @base is substituted with the document's original name (e.g. "Improvised @base").
data.label: Custom Data

separate.hint: Make this a separate button instead of part of the main effect.
separate.label: Separate

raw.hint: Whether the upgrade is proficient or fluent.
raw.label: Competence

movementAction.hint: A movement action this switches the token to.
movementAction.label: Movement Action

DIALOG.content: Would you like to change the quantity of {name} by {amount}?

formula.hint: How much to change the consumable's quantity by. Can be positive or negative.
formula.label: Formula

targetParent.hint: Whether the document providing this automation should be the one that has its quantity changed.
targetParent.label: Target Parent Document

trigger.hint: The event that causes the consumable to have its quantity changed.
trigger.label: Trigger

NOTIFICATIONS.parentNotConsumable: The parent document of this automation is not consumable.

USAGE.description: The quantity of {name} has changed by {amount}.

executor.hint: Whether the creature that executes the ability will be associated with this condition.
executor.label: Associate Executor

relation.hint: What the relationship between the effect and condition is.

target.hint: Whether to open a dialog to select tokens that will be associated with this condition.
target.label: Select Associations

qualifier.hint: Applies to all documents in the actor that meet the qualifier above.
qualifier.label: Qualifier

target.hint: Which documents this change applies to.
target.label: Target

DIALOG.content:
Would you like to take the following common outcomes?
{outcomes}

common.hint: Simple one-off effects that don't require customization.
common.label: Outcomes

competence.hint: Whether to use documents with proficiency or fluency.
competence.label: Competence

overrideCompetence.hint: If checked, the documents will have a different competence then the parent of this automation.
overrideCompetence.label: Override Competence

NOTIFICATIONS.noConfirmation: Running this without a confirmation dialog may cause performance issues or unexpected results.

reverse.hint: Remove cover instead of adding it.
reverse.label: Reverse

label.hint: Text to display on the button. Leave blank for default text.
label.label: Label

duration.hint: A formula that evaluates to a number of the specified unit.
duration.label: Formula

substitution.hint: A duration formula that the old one should be substituted with. Use "@base" to refer to the old formula and "@new" to refer to the duration specified above.
substitution.label: Substitution

identifiers.hint: External documents can be specified by UUIDs or identifiers. Identifiers refer to whatever the canonical document for a given piece of rules text. Does not support tables or folders.
identifiers.label: External Identifiers

uuids.hint: External documents can be specified by UUIDs or identifiers. UUIDs refer to specific documents. Tables and folders are allowed.
uuids.label: External UUIDs

hacks.hint: The types of hack damage that this can apply.

reverse.hint: Remove hacks instead of adding them.
reverse.label: Reverse

consumeStatDice.hint: Check this if hit dice should be consumed on use.
consumeStatDice.label: Consume Hit Dice

forHarm.hint: Check this if the healing should be done for damage.
forHarm.label: For Damage

noStatDice.hint: Whether this only displays the option to heal hacks.
noStatDice.label: No Stat Dice

distance.hint: The distance in feet to move targets from the origin of this effect. Negative values move tokens closer. Postive values move them farther.
distance.label: Distance

movementAction.hint: A movement action that the tokens will use when moving. If unset, they use whatever their movement action already was.
movementAction.label: Movement Action

origin.hint: The point that acts as the origin for this movement.
origin.label: Origin

originBarrier.hint: Whether the origin token acts as a barrier which stops movement.
originBarrier.label: Origin Barrier

relation.hint: Whether this can be used as a button from the chat message or triggers off of other behavior.

makeEffect.hint: Override whether the apply-effect button appears.
makeEffect.label: Make Effect

preventFeat.hint: Prevent the default feat save activation button from being added.
preventFeat.label: Prevent Feat Activation

preventThreshold.hint: For feat abilities, avoid determining a roll total and do not pass a fixed threshold into the generated feat activation.
preventThreshold.label: Prevent Threshold

rollBonus.hint: A bonus that's added to the execution roll. This does not work if heightened or crit.
rollBonus.label: Roll Bonus

targetsActor.hint: Override whether the effect can be applied to an actor.
targetsActor.label: Targets Actor

targetsArmament.hint: Override whether the effect can be applied to an armament.
targetsArmament.label: Targets Armament

overrideData.hint: Check this to add custom data which overrides the documents' normal data.
overrideData.label: Override Data

attachToToken.hint: Attach the region to a token. It will move with the token.
attachToToken.label: Attach to Token

deleteOnTurnChange.hint: Regions that are used just for targeting or tracking effects within a single turn can be set to get automatically deleted at the end of each turn.
deleteOnTurnChange.label: Delete on Turn Change

excludeToken.hint: The targeted token will not be included in the region.
excludeToken.label: Exclude Token

expandWithToken.hint: Expand the region by the diameter of the executor's token.
expandWithToken.label: Expand with Token

targeting.hint: Update the targeted tokens to those within the selected region.
targeting.label: Targeting

hex.hint: Whether this is a hexproof roll.

consumeStatDice.hint: Check this if mana dice should be consumed on use.
consumeStatDice.label: Consume Mana Dice

forHarm.hint: Check this if the revitalizing should be done for drain.
forHarm.label: For Drain

formula.hint: The formula to use for the roll.
formula.label: Formula

merge.hint: Whether to merge this roll with other valid rolls of the same type that have merging enabled.
merge.label: Merge

sfx.hint: 3D dice of this type will have this special effect applied to them.
sfx.label: Special Effects

style.hint: 3D dice of this type will have this style applied to them.
style.label: Style

NOTIFICATIONS.DsnRequired: The "Dice So Nice!" module is required for this automation to work.

all.hint: If checked, all options will be selected without additional prompting.
all.label: Select All

automatic.hint: If checked and this has only one option, it will be selected automatically without additional prompting.
automatic.label: Automatic

multi.hint: If checked, multiple options can be selected to be used at once.
multi.label: Multiple Selection

consumeStatDice.hint: Whether this consumes stat dice by default.
consumeStatDice.label: Consume Stat Dice

forHarm.hint: Whether this rolls dice for harm by default.
forHarm.label: For Harm

substitution.hint: Formula that replaces each die roll. Use @base to refer to the original die.
substitution.label: Substitution

SelectVisibleTokens.hint: The targets of {effect} will be {status} with respect to the selected tokens.

multi.hint: If checked, multiple tokens can be selected to be associated with this condition at once.
multi.label: Multiple Selection

relation.hint: Apply, remove, toggle, or include the condition as part of the ability's effect.

merge.hint: If selected, there will be only one button displayed that covers all tokens.
merge.label: Merge

identifier.hint: The typed identifier for some other document to suppress. This applies before competence change automations are applied.
identifier.label: Identifier

amount.hint: A numerical amount of the effect to take. Leave blank to have it be the result of a roll if applicable.
amount.label: Amount

bonus.hint: Formula that defines a bonus that gets added to the roll. Can be negative.
bonus.label: Bonus

threshold.hint: Formula that defines the DC for this roll. Can be left blank.
threshold.label: Threshold

add.hint: These children will be added to the document that contains this automation if they don't already exist.
add.label: Add

qualifier.hint: Children will only be added or removed if this qualifier evaluates to a truthy value while the specified trigger event fires.
qualifier.label: Qualifier

remove.hint: These children will be removed from the document that contains this automation if they exist.
remove.label: Remove

trigger.hint: The event that causes this toggling to occur.
trigger.label: Trigger

tradecrafts.hint: Tradecrafts that can be selected when this automation executes.
tradecrafts.label: Tradecrafts

trigger.hint: An optional trigger that makes this happen automatically. Buttons will appear in chat messages if this is left blank.
trigger.label: Trigger

abilityNames.hint: Abilities that this can directly cause the execution of.
abilityNames.label: Abilities

expandTables.hint: If checked, select from the documents within tables instead of rolling the table itself.
expandTables.label: Expand Tables

identifiers.hint: Typed identifiers for the local documents to be used. Identifiers are kebab-case and have no special characters. They should be of the format {type}:{identifier}.
identifiers.label: Local Identifiers

qualifier.hint: Include all documents in the actor that meet the qualifier above. If this is non-zero, all documents that are children of of the actor executing this will be considered for selection. If the formula entered above evaluates to a truthy value given that document's roll data, it will be included.
qualifier.label: Local Qualifier

overrideData.hint: Check this to add custom data which overrides the executions' normal data.
overrideData.label: Override Data
